candidate_definition_hints.text: To obtain high resolution face images from CelebA

[CelebA](http://mmlab.ie.cuhk.edu.hk/projects/CelebA.html) dataset provides an aligned set `img_align_celeba.zip`. However, the size of each aligned image is **218x178**, so the faces cropped from such images would be even smaller!

candidate_glosses.text: [CelebA](http://mmlab.ie.cuhk.edu.hk/projects/CelebA.html) dataset provides an aligned set `img_align_celeba.zip`. However, the size of each aligned image is **218x178**, so the faces cropped from such images would be even smaller!

source_repo_description: To obtain high resolution face images from CelebA
